title: Project link section parser and validator

source.subject: feat(analysis): add project link section + parser/validator

body:
## What shipped

Analysis parses and validates **Project.proj** link sections for foreign libraries and mod references.

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `abb7bd4`

> feat(analysis): add project link section + parser/validator

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
